news.t: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF

overview.description: The FIS Faith Income ETF (FTHB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in fixed income securities consistent with Christian values. It invests in US Treasurys and corporate debt issued by US and foreign countries FTHB was launched on Mar 19, 2026 and is issued by Faith Investor Services.

data.title: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF
data.text: New ETF offers Catholic investors a core bond holding to align their faith and fixed income investments. SCOTTSDALE, Ariz.
